hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: ARAUCA RESIDENCE in Gisenyi offers family rooms with private bathrooms, walk-in showers, and modern amenities. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free WiFi, ensuring a pleasant stay.
Dining and Leisure: The hotel features a family-friendly restaurant serving African, French, Indian, and international cuisines. Guests can enjoy brunch, dinner, and cocktails in a modern ambience. Additional facilities include a terrace, bar, and outdoor fireplace.
Convenient Services: ARAUCA RESIDENCE provides free WiFi, private check-in and check-out, and a paid shuttle service. The property offers a lounge, concierge, and live music, catering to diverse guest needs.

hotels.description_en:
Beachfront Living: Murugo Bay in Gisenyi offers a private beach area and direct beachfront access. Guests can relax on the terrace or balcony, enjoying garden views and the sound of the waves.
Comfortable Accommodation: The villa features two bedrooms and three bathrooms, equipped with modern amenities such as a kitchen, minibar, and wardrobe. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can enjoy an indoor and outdoor play area, badminton equipment hire, and outdoor seating areas. The property also provides free off-site private parking and full-day security.
Activities and Surroundings: Murugo Bay offers fishing, walking tours, canoeing, and hiking. The surrounding area provides ample opportunities for outdoor enthusiasts.
